overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, showing a rainy night walk through neon-lit urban streets. The player navigates wet sidewalks, crosses intersections with vehicle traffic, and gazes up at towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial arcade street with reflective wet pavement

events.description: passing pedestrian with illuminated umbrella briefly obscures the view

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk beneath pink neon arcade signs, following a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: walking ahead carrying an illuminated pink umbrella

entered.detail: building facade with bright pink neon strip lighting and curved architectural roof
large illuminated advertisement billboard displaying REAL WATER text with portrait
black metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge
vertical neon sign with Japanese characters and blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking beneath intense pink neon lights of an arcade building. The player follows a pedestrian carrying a glowing umbrella past reflective wet pavement, while a large billboard advertises Real Water on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with vehicle traffic and crosswalk

events.description: white van drives through the intersection from left to right
ego stops at curb to wait for traffic before crossing the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection for vehicles to pass, then beginning to cross the wet asphalt street

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection crossing the pedestrian path
yellow taxi waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: corner building with blue neon HOTEL signage and multiple stories
extended fabric awning over sidewalk seating area with red trim
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a wide intersection where a white van passes in front of the camera. After waiting for traffic, the scene shows the crossing area with yellow taxi visible in the distance and a hotel building with blue neon signage on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with outdoor dining and street vending machines

events.description: moving from open intersection into covered walkway area with storefronts and seating

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor café tables and examining street vending machines and magazine stands

entered.detail: plastic chairs and tables arranged under large umbrellas along the sidewalk
illuminated vending machine with FEEL THE CITY advertisement poster
metal rack displaying colorful magazines and comic books
large blue neon sign with Japanese characters HOテル

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite side of the street, the player passes outdoor café seating under fabric awnings and approaches a vending machine and magazine stand. The area feels more enclosed with the hotel sign glowing blue on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner approaching crosswalk with towering neon-lit buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of surrounding skyscrapers and overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: stopping at the crosswalk and looking up at the towering neon-lit buildings overhead

entered.detail: massive curved residential tower with vertical neon pink lighting strips
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with illuminated signage
multiple floating holographic advertisements and neon signs between buildings

segments.scene_description: Approaching another crosswalk, the player looks up in awe at a massive cylindrical tower covered in pink neon lights, connected by an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scale of the cyberpunk architecture becomes apparent as the camera tilts upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical view of skyscraper canyon transitioning back to street level

events.description: camera pans down from the skyscrapers back to street level view
returning to street-level perspective of the intersection and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: panning around to view the architecture above, then returning focus to the street ahead

entered.detail: traffic signs and street name markers at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera continues to pan up the towering skyscrapers, showing the dense vertical architecture and floating advertisements, then slowly returns to street level, revealing the crosswalk and surrounding neon storefronts as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that shifts from intimate street-level exploration to a sweeping gaze at towering urban architecture. It begins beneath the intense pink neon glow of an arcade, following a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella past reflective pavements and a large water advertisement. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the view opens up to passing vans and distant yellow taxis before shifting toward a hotel marked by blue neon signage. The scene then narrows as the camera passes outdoor café seating and a magazine stand, eventually approaching a crosswalk where the perspective tilts sharply upward to reveal a massive cylindrical tower and an overhead pedestrian bridge. Finally, the camera pans across the dense verticality of skyscrapers and floating advertisements before slowly returning to street level to reveal the surrounding neon storefronts.
